name_en: M13908 Black Gradient! Zippy Coin Purse! Featuring cool canvas paired with soft leather lining, it includes practical compartments and card slots for easy storage of credit cards, cash, receipts, and more. The fold-over design makes it compact and portable.
name_cn:
M13908 Black Gradient! Zippy Coin Purse! Featuring cool canvas paired with soft leather lining, it includes practical compartments and card slots for easy storage of credit cards, cash, receipts, and more. The fold-over design makes it compact and portable.
Size: 19.5×10.5×2.5cm.
